arts.ttl: Roma Push For Napoli Striker Raspadori
arts.sum: Giacomo Raspadori's future at Napoli hangs in the balance as multiple Serie A clubs express strong interest in the talented Italian forward. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that Roma have made a significant move, initiating fresh contact with Napoli's management to explore the potential transfer. The post Roma Push For Napoli Striker Raspadori appeared first on FootItalia.com.
